textbook: 人教版 PEP 英语五年级上册

unit_test.title: Unit 2 My week 单元基础达标测

questions.question: 'Monday' 的中文意思是 '星期一'。
questions.explanation: Monday 是周一。

questions.question: 'Thursday' 在 'Friday' 之后。
questions.explanation: Thursday 是周四，Friday 是周五，周四在周五之前。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合ee和ea的发音
questions.question: 单词 'beef' 和 'tea' 中划线部分发音相同。
questions.explanation: ee 和 ea 在这些单词中都发长元音 /i:/。

questions.question: 在句子 'What do you have on Mondays?' 中，Monday 必须用复数形式表示每个周一。
questions.explanation: on Mondays 表示每个周一，符合习惯表达。

questions.question: 'Weekend' 的意思是 '周末'，包含周六和周日。
questions.explanation: weekend 由 week 和 end 组成，意为周末。

questions.question: Which day is between Tuesday and Thursday?
questions.explanation: 周二和周四之间是周三 Wednesday。

questions.question: I ______ play football on the weekend.
questions.explanation: often 为频度副词，放在实义动词 play 之前。

questions.question: What ______ you have on Tuesdays?
questions.explanation: 主语为 you，助动词用 do。

questions.question: It's 7:00 a.m. It's time ______ get up.
questions.explanation: It's time to do sth. 是固定句型。

questions.question: What do you do on ______?
questions.explanation: 星期单词首字母需大写，表经常性行为用复数。

questions.question: — Do you often read books here? — ______
questions.explanation: Do 引导的一般疑问句，否定回答为 No, I don't.

questions.question: I have PE and music ______ Wednesdays.
questions.explanation: 在具体的某一天前用介词 on。

questions.question: Who is your music teacher? — ______
questions.explanation: Who 提问人，回答应为姓名或称呼。

questions.question: Saturday and Sunday are the ______.
questions.explanation: 周六周日合称周末 (the weekend)。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合ee和ea的发音
questions.question: Which word has a different sound?
questions.explanation: bread 中的 ea 发 /e/，其他发 /i:/。

questions.question: The day after Sunday is ______.
questions.explanation: 周日之后是周一。

questions.question: I have an ______ class today. I like drawing.
questions.explanation: drawing 与美术课相关。

questions.question: What ______ you have on Fridays?
questions.explanation: 助动词填空。

questions.question: I ______ watch TV on Saturdays.
questions.explanation: 填入频度副词表示经常。

questions.question: 将下列英文单词与对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: Tuesday-星期二, Friday-星期五, Saturday-星期六, Sunday-星期日。

questions.question: 将下列短语与对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: wash my clothes-洗衣服, watch TV-看电视, do homework-做作业, play football-踢足球。

questions.question: 连词成句：
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问句结构。

questions.question: 连词成句：
questions.explanation: 频度副词在动词前。

exam.title: 五年级上册 Unit 2 My week 期中综合模拟考试

questions.question: 周三的英文拼写是 'Wednesday'。
questions.explanation: Wednesday 中间的d不发音，容易拼错。

questions.question: 句子 'I often watch TV' 中 often 的位置是正确的。
questions.explanation: often 位于实义动词 watch 之前。

questions.question: 'What do you have on Mondays?' 只能回答学科，不能回答活动。
questions.explanation: have 通常接课程/学科，问活动常用 What do you do。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合ee和ea的发音
questions.question: 单词 'head' 中 ea 的发音和 'read' 完全相同。
questions.explanation: head 发 /e/，read 发 /i:/。

questions.question: 英语国家的一周第一天通常是 Sunday。
questions.explanation: 西方文化习惯周日为首日。

questions.question: We have ______ on Mondays.
questions.explanation: 学科名词前不加冠词，Chinese 作为学科是不可数名词。

questions.question: — Is it Friday today? — ______
questions.explanation: Is it 开头的一般疑问句，肯定回答用 Yes, it is.（不可缩写）

questions.question: I like ______. Because I can play football.
questions.explanation: 踢足球属于体育课内容。

questions.question: Do you ______ wash your clothes?
questions.explanation: 放在动词前的频度副词。

questions.question: Today is Wednesday. Tomorrow is ______.
questions.explanation: 周三的明天是周四。

questions.question: What ______ you do on the weekend?
questions.explanation: 助动词 do 用于第二人称。

questions.question: I have English, maths and art. ______ you?
questions.explanation: What about you? 用于反问对方同样的问题。

questions.question: We should ______ on the weekend.
questions.explanation: should 后面接动词原形。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合ee和ea的发音
questions.question: Find the word with different sound for 'ea'.
questions.explanation: healthy 中的 ea 发 /e/，其他发 /i:/。

questions.question: Which one is a weekend day?
questions.explanation: Sunday 是周末的一种。

questions.question: What do you ______ on Saturdays?
questions.explanation: 询问活动用 do。

questions.question: Tuesday comes after ______.
questions.explanation: 周一之后是周二。

questions.question: I have ______ and music. I like numbers.
questions.explanation: numbers 表明是数学课。

questions.question: Saturday and Sunday are the ______.
questions.explanation: 周末的英文。

questions.question: 英汉配对（课程与活动）：
questions.explanation: science-科学, read books-看书, play sports-体育运动, Tuesday-星期二。

questions.question: 英汉配对（特征形容词）：
questions.explanation: strict-严厉, funny-滑稽, kind-和蔼, helpful-有帮助/有用。

questions.question: 连词成句：
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问句基本语序。

questions.question: 连词成句：
questions.explanation: 注意 often 在动词 watch 之前。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 熟练掌握周一至周日的英文缩写与全拼
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 星期单词首字母必须大写；Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday
knowledge_summary.tips: 可以将单词拆分记忆，如 Wed-nes-day, Satur-day。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 掌握 have (课程) 与 do (活动) 的区别
knowledge_summary.key_formula: What do you have on + 星期s? vs What do you do on + 星期s?
common_mistakes: 问课程时用了 do 而不是 have
周几前面的介词用错 (应用 on)
knowledge_summary.tips: 看见 days 复数形式通常表示“每逢周几”。

knowledge_summary.key_formula: 主语 + often + 动词原形/其他 + 时间
common_mistakes: 在 be 动词句子中放置位置不当
knowledge_summary.tips: 记口诀：often 放在实义动词前，be 动词后。

knowledge_summary.point: 字母组合 ee/ea 发音规律
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 在重读音节中 ee 和大部分 ea 发长音 /i:/
knowledge_summary.key_formula: feet, beef, meet, seed (ee) | tea, read, eat, sea (ea)
common_mistakes: 将 bread, head, healthy 中的 ea 读成 /i:/ (应读 /e/)
knowledge_summary.tips: 见到 ee 快读长 E，见到 ea 大多同，少数特例需记牢。
